revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:皇大神宮 (曖昧さ回避)]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

'''皇大神宮'''（こうたいじんぐう） * [[皇大神宮]] - 三重県伊勢市に鎮座。 * [[伊勢山皇大神宮]] - 神奈川県横浜市西区に鎮座。 * [[鵠沼皇大神宮]] - 神奈川県藤沢市に鎮座。 * [[天照皇大神宮]] - 福岡県糟屋郡久山町に鎮座。 * 皇大神宮 - 長崎県長崎市に鎮座。⇒[[山王神社 (長崎市)]]
== 関連項目 == * [[神明神社]] * [[天照皇大神宮教]]
{{デフォルトソート:こうたいしんくう}} {{aimai}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

'''皇大神宮'''（こうたいじんぐう） * [[皇大神宮]] - 三重県伊勢市に鎮座。 * [[伊勢山皇大神宮]] - 神奈川県横浜市西区に鎮座。 * [[皇大神宮 (藤沢市)]] - 神奈川県藤沢市に鎮座。 * [[天照皇大神宮]] - 福岡県糟屋郡久山町に鎮座。 * 皇大神宮 - 長崎県長崎市に鎮座。⇒[[山王神社 (長崎市)]]
== 関連項目 == * [[神明神社]] * [[天照皇大神宮教]]
{{デフォルトソート:こうたいしんくう}} {{aimai}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

'''皇大神宮'''（こうたいじんぐう）は[[天照大御神]]を祀る神社。 ==一覧== * [[皇大神宮]] - [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]に鎮座。[[伊勢神宮]]の内宮。 * [[伊勢山皇大神宮]] - [[神奈川県]][[横浜市]][[西区 (横浜市)|西区]]に鎮座。 * [[皇大神宮 (藤沢市)|皇大神宮]] - [[神奈川県]][[藤沢市]]に鎮座。 * [[皇大神宮 (大阪市)|皇大神宮]] - [[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[城東区]][[今福南]]に鎮座。 * [[皇大神宮 (石井町)|皇大神宮]] - [[徳島県]][[名西郡]][[石井町]]に鎮座。 * [[天照皇大神宮]] - [[福岡県]][[糟屋郡]][[久山町]]に鎮座。 * 浦上皇大神宮 - [[長崎県]][[長崎市]]に鎮座。→[[山王神社 (長崎市)|山王神社]]
== 関連項目 == * [[神明神社]] * [[天照皇大神宮教]]
{{デフォルトソート:こうたいしんくう}} {{aimai}} [[Category:同名の神社]] [[Category:神明神社]]

'''皇大神宮'''（こうたいじんぐう）は、[[天照大御神]]を祀る[[神社]]。 ==主な皇大神宮== * [[皇大神宮]] – [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]宇治館町 ： [[伊勢神宮]]内宮 * [[伊勢山皇大神宮]] – [[神奈川県]][[横浜市]][[西区 (横浜市)|西区]][[宮崎町 (横浜市)|宮崎町]] * [[皇大神宮 (藤沢市)|皇大神宮]] – [[神奈川県]][[藤沢市]]鵠沼神明 * [[皇大神宮 (大阪市)|皇大神宮]] – [[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[城東区]][[今福南]] * [[皇大神宮 (石井町)|皇大神宮]] – [[徳島県]][[名西郡]][[石井町]] * [[天照皇大神宮]] – [[福岡県]][[糟屋郡]][[久山町]] * 浦上皇大神宮 – [[長崎県]][[長崎市]]坂本 ： [[山王神社 (長崎市)|山王神社]]の別名

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[皇大神宮 (曖昧さ回避)]] to [[Kōtai Jingū (disambiguation)]]

revision.text:
'''Kōtai Jingū''' (皇大神宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} that enshrines {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大御神|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami}}.
The Main shrine is the {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮}} of [[Ise Grand Shrine]] and shrines with the same name are Branch shrines of that shrine. Similar to shrines called {{ill|Daijingū|ja|大神宮}}. While {{ill|Jingu|ja|神宮}} is a highly prestigious title limited to only a few shrines. Kotai Jingus and Daijingus (皇大神宮 and 大神宮) are often much less prestigious and have that title by virtue of being branch shrines of a highly prestigious shrine
==List== * {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮}} - Located in {{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}. The Inner Shrine (Naikū) of {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}}. * {{ill|Iseyama Kōtai Jingu|ja|伊勢山皇大神宮}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Yokohama|ja|西区 (横浜市)}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. * {{ill|Kōtaijingū (Fujisawa)|ja|皇大神宮 (藤沢市)}} - Located in {{ill|Fujisawa|ja|藤沢市}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Kōtaijingū (Osaka)|ja|皇大神宮 (大阪市)}} - Located in {{ill|Jōtō-ku, Osaka|ja|城東区}}, {{ill|Osaka|ja|大阪市}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|ja|大阪府}}, specifically in {{ill|Imafuku Minami|ja|今福南}}. * {{ill|Kōtaijingū (Ishii)|ja|皇大神宮 (石井町)}} - Located in {{ill|Ishii|ja|石井町}}, {{ill|Myōzai District|ja|名西郡}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. * {{ill|Amaterasu Kōtaijingū|ja|天照皇大神宮}} - Located in {{ill|Hisayama|ja|久山町}}, {{ill|Kasuya District|ja|糟屋郡}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}. * {{ill|Urakami Kōtaijingū|ja|浦上皇大神宮}} - Located in {{ill|Nagasaki|ja|長崎市}}, {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県}}. → {{ill|Sannō Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|山王神社 (長崎市)}}
==See also== * [[Shinmei shrines]] * {{ill|Daijingū|ja|大神宮}} * {{ill|Tenshō Kōtai Jingūkyō|ja|天照皇大神宮教}} * [[皇大神社]]
[[Category:Shrines with identical names]] [[Category:Shimmei Shrines]] [[ja:皇大神宮 (曖昧さ回避)]]

revision.text:
'''皇大神宮'''（こうたいじんぐう）は、[[天照大御神]]を祀る[[神社]]。
== 主な皇大神宮 == * [[皇大神宮]] - [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]宇治館町（[[伊勢神宮]]内宮） * [[伊勢山皇大神宮]] - [[神奈川県]][[横浜市]][[西区 (横浜市)|西区]][[宮崎町 (横浜市)|宮崎町]] * [[皇大神宮 (藤沢市)]] - [[神奈川県]][[藤沢市]]鵠沼神明 * [[皇大神宮 (大阪市)]] - [[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[城東区]][[今福南]] * [[皇大神宮 (石井町)]] - [[徳島県]][[名西郡]][[石井町]] * [[天照皇大神宮]] - [[福岡県]][[糟屋郡]][[久山町]] * 浦上皇大神宮 - [[長崎県]][[長崎市]]坂本（[[山王神社 (長崎市)|山王神社]]の別名）
== 関連項目 == * [[神明神社]] * [[天照皇大神宮教]]
{{aimai}}

'''Kōtai Jingū''' (皇大神宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} that enshrines {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大御神|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami}}.
The Main shrine is the {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮}} of [[Ise Grand Shrines]][[Category:shrine disambiguations]] and shrines with the same name are Branch shrines of that shrine. Similar to shrines called {{ill|Daijingū|ja|大神宮}}. While {{ill|Jingu|ja|神宮}} is a highly prestigious title limited to only a few shrines. Kotai Jingus and Daijingus (皇大神宮 and 大神宮) are often much less prestigious and have that title by virtue of being branch shrines of a highly prestigious shrine

'''皇大神宮'''（こうたいじんぐう）は、[[天照大御神]]を祀る[[神社]]。
== 主な皇大神宮 == * [[皇大神宮]] - [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]宇治館町（[[伊勢神宮]]内宮） * [[伊勢山皇大神宮]] - [[神奈川県]][[横浜市]][[西区 (横浜市)|西区]][[宮崎町 (横浜市)|宮崎町]] * [[皇大神宮 (藤沢市)]] - [[神奈川県]][[藤沢市]]鵠沼神明 * [[皇大神宮 (大阪市)]] - [[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[城東区]][[今福南]] * [[皇大神宮 (石井町)]] - [[徳島県]][[名西郡]][[石井町]] * [[天照皇大神宮]] - [[福岡県]][[糟屋郡]][[久山町]] * 浦上皇大神宮 - [[長崎県]][[長崎市]]坂本（[[山王神社 (長崎市)|山王神社]]の別名）
== 関連項目 == * [[神宮]] * [[大神宮]] * [[神明神社]] * [[天照皇大神宮教]]
{{aimai}}
{{デフォルトソート:こうたいしんくう}} [[Category:同名の神社]] [[Category:神明神社]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
revision.text:
'''Kōtai Jingū''' (皇大神宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} that enshrines {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大御神|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami}}.
The Main shrine is the {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮}} of [[Ise Grand Shrines]] and shrines with the same name are Branch shrines of that shrine. Similar to shrines called {{ill|Daijingū|ja|大神宮}}. While {{ill|Jingu|ja|神宮}} is a highly prestigious title limited to only a few shrines. Kotai Jingus and Daijingus (皇大神宮 and 大神宮) are often much less prestigious and have that title by virtue of being branch shrines of a highly prestigious shrine
==List== * {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮}} - Located in {{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}. The Inner Shrine (Naikū) of {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}}. * {{ill|Iseyama Kōtai Jingu|ja伊勢山皇大神宮|1=Iseyama Kōtai Jingū|2=fr|3=Iseyama Kotai Jingu|4=ja|5=伊勢山皇大神宮|6=zh|7=伊勢山皇大神宮}}{{citation needed|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Yokohama|ja|西区 (横浜市)}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. * {{ill|Kotai Jingu (Fujisawa City)|ja|皇大神宮 (藤沢市)}} - Located in {{ill|Fujisawa|ja|藤沢市}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Kōtaijingū (Osaka)|ja|皇大神宮 (大阪市)|1=Kōtai Jingū (Osaka)}} - Located in {{ill|Jōtō-ku, Osaka|ja|城東区}}, {{ill|Osaka|ja|大阪市}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|ja|大阪府}}, specifically in {{ill|Imafuku Minami|ja|今福南}}. * {{ill|Kōtai Jingū (Ishii)|ja|皇大神宮 (石井町)}} - Located in {{ill|Ishii|ja|石井町}}, {{ill|Myōzai District|ja|名西郡}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. * {{ill|Amaterasu Kōtaijingū|ja伊勢山皇大神宮|1=Tenshō Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=天照皇大神宮}}{{citation needed|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮}} - Located in {{ill|Hisayama|ja|久山町}}, {{ill|Kasuya District|ja|糟屋郡}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}. * {{ill|Urakami Kōtaijingū|ja|浦上皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮}} - Located in {{ill|Nagasaki|ja|長崎市}}, {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県}}. → {{ill|Sannō Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|山王神社 (長崎市)}}
==See also== * [[Shinmei shrines]] * {{ill|Daijingū|ja|大神宮}} * {{ill|Tenshō Kōtai Jingūkyō|ja|天照皇大神宮教}} * {{ill|Kōtai Shrine|ja|皇大神社}} * {{ill|Tenso Shrine|ja|天祖神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|天祖神社}} * [[Kotai_Shrine_(disambiguation)]]
{{aimai}}

'''Kōtai Jingū''' (皇大神宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} that enshrines {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大御神|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami|12=draft}}.
The Main shrine is the {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=draft}} of [[Ise Grand Shrines]] and shrines with the same name are Branch shrines of that shrine. revision.text:
'''Kōtai Jingū''' (皇大神宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} that enshrines {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大御神|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami|12=draft}}.
The Main shrine is the {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=draft}} of [[Ise Grand Shrines]] and shrines with the same name are Branch shrines of that shrine. Similar to shrines called {{ill|Daijingū|ja|大神宮|12=draft}}. While {{ill|Jingu|ja|神宮|12=draft}} is a highly prestigious title limited to only a few shrines. Kotai Jingus and Daijingus (皇大神宮 and 大神宮) are often much less prestigious and have that title by virtue of being branch shrines of a highly prestigious shrine
==List== * {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県|12=draft}}. The Inner Shrine (Naikū) of {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Iseyama Kōtai Jingu|ja伊勢山皇大神宮|1=Iseyama Kōtai Jingū|2=fr|3=Iseyama Kotai Jingu|4=ja|5=伊勢山皇大神宮|6=zh|7=伊勢山皇大神宮|12=draft}}{{citation needed|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Yokohama|ja|西区 (横浜市)|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kotai Jingu (Fujisawa City)|ja|皇大神宮 (藤沢市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Fujisawa|ja|藤沢市|12=draft}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Kōtaijingū (Osaka)|ja|皇大神宮 (大阪市)|1=Kōtai Jingū (Osaka)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Jōtō-ku, Osaka|ja|城東区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Osaka|ja|大阪市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|ja|大阪府|12=draft}}, specifically in {{ill|Imafuku Minami|ja|今福南|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kōtai Jingū (Ishii)|ja|皇大神宮 (石井町)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Ishii|ja|石井町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Myōzai District|ja|名西郡|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Amaterasu Kōtaijingū|ja伊勢山皇大神宮|1=Tenshō Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=天照皇大神宮|12=draft}}{{citation needed|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮}} - Located in {{ill|Hisayama|ja|久山町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kasuya District|ja|糟屋郡|12=draft}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Urakami Kōtaijingū|ja|浦上皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Nagasaki|ja|長崎市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県|12=draft}}. → {{ill|Sannō Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|山王神社 (長崎市)|12=draft}}
==See also== * [[Shinmei shrines]] * {{ill|Daijingū|ja|大神宮|12=draft}} * {{ill|Tenshō Kōtai Jingūkyō|ja|天照皇大神宮教|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kōtai Shrine|ja|皇大神社|12=draft}} * {{ill|Tenso Shrine|ja|天祖神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|天祖神社|12=draft}} * [[Kotai_Shrine_(disambiguation)]]

revision.text:
'''皇大神宮'''（こうたいじんぐう）は、[[天照大御神]]を祀る[[神社]]。
== 主な皇大神宮 == * [[皇大神宮]] - [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]宇治館町（[[伊勢神宮]]内宮） * [[伊勢山皇大神宮]] - [[神奈川県]][[横浜市]][[西区 (横浜市)|西区]][[宮崎町 (横浜市)|宮崎町]] * [[皇大神宮 (藤沢市)]] - [[神奈川県]][[藤沢市]]鵠沼神明 * [[皇大神宮 (大阪市)]] - [[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[城東区]][[今福南]] * [[皇大神宮 (石井町)]] - [[徳島県]][[名西郡]][[石井町]] * [[天照皇大神宮]] - [[福岡県]][[糟屋郡]][[久山町]] * 浦上皇大神宮 - [[長崎県]][[長崎市]]坂本（[[山王神社 (長崎市)|山王神社]]の別名）
== 関連項目 == * [[神宮]] * [[大神宮]] * [[神明神社]] * [[天照皇大神宮教]]
{{aimai}}
{{デフォルトソート:こうたいしんくう}} [[Category:同名の神社]] [[Category:神明神社]]

The Main shrine is the {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Ise Grand Shrines]] and shrines with the same name are Branch shrines of that shrine. Similar to shrines called {{ill|Daijingū|ja|大神宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijingū|qq=}}. While [[:en:List of Jingū|Jingu]] is a highly prestigious title limited to only a few shrines. Kotai Jingus and Daijingus (皇大神宮 and 大神宮) are often much less prestigious and have that title by virtue of being branch shrines of a highly prestigious shrine
==List== * {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} - Located in [[:en:Ise, Mie|Ise]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]]. <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:皇大神宮 (曖昧さ回避)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q20037429]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōtai Jingū''' (皇大神宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] that enshrines {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大御神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天照大神}}.
The Main shrine is the {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Ise Grand Shrines]] and shrines with the same name are Branch shrines of that shrine. Similar to shrines called {{ill|Daijingū|ja|大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijingū|qq=}}. While [[:en:List of Jingū|Jingu]] is a highly prestigious title limited to only a few shrines. Kotai Jingus and Daijingus (皇大神宮 and 大神宮) are often much less prestigious and have that title by virtue of being branch shrines of a highly prestigious shrine
==List== * {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} - Located in [[:en:Ise, Mie|Ise]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]]. The Inner Shrine (Naikū) of [[:en:Ise Shrine|Ise Grand Shrine]]. * {{ill|Iseyama Kōtai Jingu|ja伊勢山皇大神宮|1=Iseyama Kōtai Jingū|2=fr|3=Iseyama Kotai Jingu|4=ja|5=伊勢山皇大神宮|6=zh|7=伊勢山皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iseyama Kōtai Jingu|13=User:Immanuelle/Iseyama Kōtai Jingū|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Nishi-ku, Yokohama|Nishi-ku, Yokohama]], [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama]], [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Kōdai-jingū|ja|皇大神宮 (藤沢市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōdai-jingū|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Fujisawa, Kanagawa|Fujisawa]], Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Kōtaijingū (Osaka)|ja|皇大神宮 (大阪市)|1=Kōtai Jingū (Osaka)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtaijingū (Osaka)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū (Osaka)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Jōtō-ku, Osaka|Jōtō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], specifically in {{ill|Imafuku Minami|ja|今福南|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imafuku Minami|1=Imafuku-minami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q76307293}}. * {{ill|Kōtai Jingū (Ishii)|ja|皇大神宮 (石井町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū (Ishii)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Ishii, Tokushima|Ishii]], [[:en:Myōzai District, Tokushima|Myōzai District]], [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Amaterasu Kōtaijingū|ja伊勢山皇大神宮|1=Ino-Tensho-Kodaijingu|2=ja|3=天照皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu Kōtaijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō Kōtai Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17218394}} - Located in [[:en:Hisayama, Fukuoka|Hisayama]], [[:en:Kasuya District, Fukuoka|Kasuya District]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Urakami Kōtaijingū|ja|浦上皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urakami Kōtaijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} - Located in [[:en:Nagasaki|Nagasaki]], [[:en:Nagasaki Prefecture|Nagasaki Prefecture]]. → [[:en:Sannō Shrine|Sannō Shrine (Nagasaki)]]
==See also== * [[:en:Shinmei shrines|Shinmei shrines]] * {{ill|Daijingū|ja|大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijingū|qq=}} * [[:en:Tenshō Kōtai Jingūkyō|Tenshō Kōtai Jingūkyō]] * {{ill|Kōtai Shrine|ja|皇大神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神明神社}} * {{ill|Tenso Shrine|ja|天祖神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|天祖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenso Shrine|qq=}} * [[Kotai_Shrine_(disambiguation)]]
{{disambiguation}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:皇大神宮 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:皇大神宮 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:皇大神宮 (曖昧さ回避)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q20037429]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōtai Jingū''' (皇大神宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} that enshrines {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大御神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天照大神}}.
The Main shrine is the {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Ise Grand Shrines]] and shrines with the same name are Branch shrines of that shrine. Similar to shrines called {{ill|Daijingū|ja|大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijingū|qq=}}. While {{ill|List of Jingū|en|List of Jingū|WD=Q120680118|lt=Jingu}} is a highly prestigious title limited to only a few shrines. Kotai Jingus and Daijingus (皇大神宮 and 大神宮) are often much less prestigious and have that title by virtue of being branch shrines of a highly prestigious shrine
==List== * {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} - Located in {{ill|Ise, Mie|en|Ise, Mie|WD=Q328067|lt=Ise}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|WD=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture}}. The Inner Shrine (Naikū) of {{ill|Ise Shrine|en|Ise Shrine|WD=Q687168|lt=Ise Grand Shrine}}. * {{ill|Iseyama Kōtai Jingu|ja伊勢山皇大神宮|1=Iseyama Kōtai Jingū|2=fr|3=Iseyama Kotai Jingu|4=ja|5=伊勢山皇大神宮|6=zh|7=伊勢山皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iseyama Kōtai Jingu|13=User:Immanuelle/Iseyama Kōtai Jingū|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Yokohama|en|Nishi-ku, Yokohama|WD=Q1203393|lt=Nishi-ku, Yokohama}}, {{ill|Yokohama|en|Yokohama|WD=Q38283|lt=Yokohama}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Kōdai-jingū|ja|皇大神宮 (藤沢市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōdai-jingū|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Fujisawa, Kanagawa|en|Fujisawa, Kanagawa|WD=Q386661|lt=Fujisawa}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Kōtaijingū (Osaka)|ja|皇大神宮 (大阪市)|1=Kōtai Jingū (Osaka)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtaijingū (Osaka)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū (Osaka)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Jōtō-ku, Osaka|en|Jōtō-ku, Osaka|WD=Q490508|lt=Jōtō-ku, Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka|en|Osaka|WD=Q35765|lt=Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|WD=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture}}, specifically in {{ill|Imafuku Minami|ja|今福南|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imafuku Minami|1=Imafuku-minami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q76307293}}. * {{ill|Kōtai Jingū (Ishii)|ja|皇大神宮 (石井町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū (Ishii)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ishii, Tokushima|en|Ishii, Tokushima|WD=Q1205943|lt=Ishii}}, {{ill|Myōzai District, Tokushima|en|Myōzai District, Tokushima|WD=Q1155732|lt=Myōzai District}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Amaterasu Kōtaijingū|ja伊勢山皇大神宮|1=Ino-Tensho-Kodaijingu|2=ja|3=天照皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu Kōtaijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō Kōtai Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17218394}} - Located in {{ill|Hisayama, Fukuoka|en|Hisayama, Fukuoka|WD=Q1206089|lt=Hisayama}}, {{ill|Kasuya District, Fukuoka|en|Kasuya District, Fukuoka|WD=Q1206294|lt=Kasuya District}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Urakami Kōtaijingū|ja|浦上皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urakami Kōtaijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} - Located in {{ill|Nagasaki|en|Nagasaki|WD=Q38234|lt=Nagasaki}}, {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|en|Nagasaki Prefecture|WD=Q169376|lt=Nagasaki Prefecture}}. → {{ill|Sannō Shrine|en|Sannō Shrine|WD=Q211522|lt=Sannō Shrine (Nagasaki)}}
==See also== * {{ill|Shinmei shrines|en|Shinmei shrines|WD=Q11590310|lt=Shinmei shrines}} * {{ill|Daijingū|ja|大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijingū|qq=}} * {{ill|Tenshō Kōtai Jingūkyō|en|Tenshō Kōtai Jingūkyō|WD=Q1788105|lt=Tenshō Kōtai Jingūkyō}} * {{ill|Kōtai Shrine|ja|皇大神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神明神社}} * {{ill|Tenso Shrine|ja|天祖神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|天祖神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenso Shrine|qq=}} * [[Kotai_Shrine_(disambiguation)]]

Similar to shrines called {{ill|Daijingū|ja|大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijingū|qq=}}. While {{ill|List of Jingū|en|List of Jingū|WD=Q120680118|lt=Jingu|1=List of Jingū}} is a highly prestigious title limited to only a few shrines. Kotai Jingus and Daijingus (皇大神宮 and 大神宮) are often much less prestigious and have that title by virtue of being branch shrines of a highly prestigious shrine

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:皇大神宮 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:皇大神宮 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:皇大神宮 (曖昧さ回避)]]
'''Kōtai Jingū''' (皇大神宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} that enshrines {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大御神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天照大神}}.
The Main shrine is the {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Ise Grand Shrines]] and shrines with the same name are Branch shrines of that shrine. Similar to shrines called {{ill|Daijingū|ja|大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijingū|qq=}}. While {{ill|List of Jingū|en|List of Jingū|qid=Q120680118|lt=Jingu|1=List of Jingū}} is a highly prestigious title limited to only a few shrines. Kotai Jingus and Daijingus (皇大神宮 and 大神宮) are often much less prestigious and have that title by virtue of being branch shrines of a highly prestigious shrine
==List== * {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} - Located in {{ill|Ise, Mie|en|Ise, Mie|qid=Q328067|lt=Ise|1=Ise, Mie}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|qid=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture|1=Mie Prefecture}}. The Inner Shrine (Naikū) of {{ill|Ise Shrine|en|Ise Shrine|qid=Q687168|lt=Ise Grand Shrine|1=Ise Grand Shrine}}. * {{ill|Iseyama Kōtai Jingu|ja伊勢山皇大神宮|1=Iseyama Kōtai Jingū|2=fr|3=Iseyama Kotai Jingu|4=ja|5=伊勢山皇大神宮|6=zh|7=伊勢山皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iseyama Kōtai Jingu|13=User:Immanuelle/Iseyama Kōtai Jingū|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Yokohama|en|Nishi-ku, Yokohama|qid=Q1203393|lt=Nishi-ku, Yokohama|1=Nishi-ku, Yokohama}}, {{ill|Yokohama|en|Yokohama|qid=Q38283|lt=Yokohama|1=Yokohama}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Kōdai-jingū|ja|皇大神宮 (藤沢市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōdai-jingū|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Fujisawa, Kanagawa|en|Fujisawa, Kanagawa|qid=Q386661|lt=Fujisawa|1=Fujisawa, Kanagawa}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Kōtaijingū (Osaka)|ja|皇大神宮 (大阪市)|1=Kōtai Jingū (Osaka)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtaijingū (Osaka)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū (Osaka)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Jōtō-ku, Osaka|en|Jōtō-ku, Osaka|qid=Q490508|lt=Jōtō-ku, Osaka|1=Jōtō-ku, Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka|en|Osaka|qid=Q35765|lt=Osaka|1=Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}, specifically in {{ill|Imafuku Minami|ja|今福南|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imafuku Minami|1=Imafuku-minami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q76307293}}. * {{ill|Kōtai Jingū (Ishii)|ja|皇大神宮 (石井町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū (Ishii)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ishii, Tokushima|en|Ishii, Tokushima|qid=Q1205943|lt=Ishii|1=Ishii, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Myōzai District, Tokushima|en|Myōzai District, Tokushima|qid=Q1155732|lt=Myōzai District|1=Myōzai District, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|qid=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Amaterasu Kōtaijingū|ja伊勢山皇大神宮|1=Ino Tenshō Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=天照皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu Kōtaijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō Kōtai Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17218394}} - Located in {{ill|Hisayama, Fukuoka|en|Hisayama, Fukuoka|qid=Q1206089|lt=Hisayama|1=Hisayama, Fukuoka}}, {{ill|Kasuya District, Fukuoka|en|Kasuya District, Fukuoka|qid=Q1206294|lt=Kasuya District|1=Kasuya District, Fukuoka}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|qid=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Urakami Kōtaijingū|ja|浦上皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urakami Kōtaijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} -
